title: Dietrich Kappe
text: Home * People * Dietrich Kappe Dietrich Kappe , an American computer expert, CTO of Orthogonal (a medical device software development and design company) [1] . He is also an amateur blues musician, chess player, and political analyst. He is the author of A0lite , a didactic UCI compliant neural network chess engine, written in Python .
